message:
feat(ballast,daemon,monitor): expand manager allocation logic and PID controller tuning

Major expansion of the ballast manager (130 lines changed) with improved
allocation strategies and error handling. Also enhances the coordinator
with better orchestration logic, simplifies the release module, expands
the daemon main loop with additional monitoring stages, and improves the
PID controller with refined tuning parameters and measurement handling.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
